title: thymus incanus
intro: Thymus incanus, also known as the Alpine Thyme, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thymus incanus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Thymus incanus typically include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and fight off infections.
